components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #124734; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Bornia', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; padding: 12px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; text-transform: uppercase; transition: background-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #00AC69; }

components.name: Standard Card
components.html:
SOLUCIONES DE INVERSIÓN

Como sus gestores de activos en MMG Bank nos enfocamos en optimizar sus portafolios y resguardar su capital.
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #FFFFFF; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #F2EFEE; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Bornia', sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { color: #124734; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-body { color: #0D0D0D; font-size: 15px; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: MMG Bank's design language is an elegant, editorial system that blends organic green tones with a warm cream canvas. It focuses on clean, responsive grids, crisp alignment, and high-contrast Bornia typography. The system values visual breathing room, clarity, and flat, structured blocks rather than heavy dropshadows or complex decorations.
keyCharacteristics: Editorial Spaciousness: Generous margin and padding rules that prioritize content layout over crowded dashboards.
Harmonious Greens & Warm Neutrals: Saturated greens acting as primary brand indicators against a clean cream canvas.
Clean Geometric Construction: Low border radii (4px-8px) for buttons and containers, enforcing structural precision.

rules.name: The Color Conservation Rule
rules.body: Keep the Active Green accent (#00AC69) to under 10% of any viewport to preserve its visual impact.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Use background colors or 1px outlines to divide layers. Shadows should only appear to signal hover/active states on interactive elements.

dos: Do wrap primary blocks in .container-custom to maintain a unified grid width across device viewports.
Do separate text and image content with generous spacing (section-gap and element-padding).
Do maintain strong legibility (>=4.5:1 contrast) for all text.
donts: Don't use large rounded corners (border-radius > 12px) on cards or content blocks.
Don't use soft, heavy shadows to convey structure; keep outlines clean and simple.
Don't introduce complex gradient overlays under body text that reduce readability.
